selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next math-class controller reduction on the action board and completed the immediate engine / entropy / geometry trio.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the geometry admissibility math-class packet into controller-facing fences for thin relation-level geometry, weak incidence and locality handling, anti-metric and anti-coordinate defaults, transport-grounded obstruction-sensitive path use, and anti-embedding / anti-continuity boundaries.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest non-math-class bounded follow-on still sitting in the immediate tranche.
Next refined-fuel folder-order follow-on after the geometry trio and a clean overlay-governance fence candidate.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the geometry-language guardrails tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: GEOMETRY_IS_DECLARED_RELATION_STRUCTURE_ONLY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves geometry here as thin declared relation structure rather than a new primitive or manifold stack.

candidate_items.name: INCIDENCE_AND_LOCALITY_STAY_EXPLICIT_AND_WEAK
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps incidence and locality from hardening into symmetry, neighborhood, or topology law.

candidate_items.name: GEOMETRY_DOES_NOT_IMPORT_METRIC_COORDINATE_OR_DIMENSION_STACK
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's anti-metric, anti-coordinate, and anti-dimension boundary into a controller fence.

candidate_items.name: GEOMETRY_REMAINS_TRANSPORT_GROUNDED_AND_OBSTRUCTION_SENSITIVE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps geometry subordinate to transport support, explicit concatenation, and visible obstruction.

candidate_items.name: NO_EMBEDDING_CONTINUITY_OR_AMBIENT_SPACE_ESCALATION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's anti-embedding and anti-analytic boundary into a direct controller fence.

quarantined_items.name: GEOMETRY_VOCABULARY_AS_MANIFOLD_OR_METRIC_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent blocks manifold, metric-space, chart, curvature, tensor, and differential-geometry imports while preserving the lexical temptation.

quarantined_items.name: LOCALITY_OR_PATH_LANGUAGE_AS_HIDDEN_TOPOLOGY_OR_GLOBAL_FLATNESS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent keeps locality weak, path use transport-grounded, and obstruction visible, so stronger topology and universal-flatness readings stay out of bounds.

notes: This batch was produced after the earlier thirteen controller-facing A2-mid reductions as the fourteenth bounded controller reduction in this audit pass.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
